name: Be Brave, Barb
short_description: Barb the cactus has lost her positive affirmations! How will she get through the day? How will she face her fears? How will she defeat King Cloudy and his evil henchmen? I have no idea. Maybe you should play this gravity-bending platforming adventure right now and find out?
detailed_description:
Barb the cactus has lost her positive affirmations! How will she get through the day? How will she face her fears? How will she defeat King Cloudy and his evil henchmen? I have no idea. Maybe you should play this gravity-bending platforming adventure right now and find out?

  • An all-new platforming adventure from the creator of Dadish

  • Walk all over the walls, ignore gravity, who cares

  • Lots of positive affirmations to find

  • 100 levels

  • 5 bosses

  • Questionable therapy

  • Secrets to unlock

  • Controller support

  • Funky tunes

  • Rad graphics

  • Face your fears

  • Have a nice day
